title: Brackenridgea arenaria
uses: Brackenridgea arenaria, a plant native to the tropical regions of the Western Ghats in India, has been traditionally used in folk medicine for various purposes. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal uses. In traditional medicine, Brackenridgea arenaria is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
